meaning: n.委内瑞拉(南美洲北部国家)
examples: Leaders of eight Latin American countries are meeting in Caracas, Venezuela, today.
Venezuela is the ideal starting point to explore the grandeur and natural beauty of South America.
In Venezuela, collapsing oil prices have sent its economy into free-fall.
Venezuela's foreign minister said the meeting would "derail" good relations between the two countries.
Workers from other Petroleos de Venezuela facilities have been sent in to help stop the fire.
